rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" directly and unambiguously delegates prose improvement — sentence clarity, redundancy removal, paragraph flow, and stylistic consistency. This is the load-bearing responsibility; failure to improve writing quality invalidates the delegation. R1.2 and R1.5 are set to 0.3 (peripheral) because competent editing may incidentally surface minor logical repetitions (e.g., the moving-average ablation re-arguing a claim already made in paragraph 2) and paragraph-level restructuring opportunities, but neither was explicitly requested and neither is load-bearing.
